compiled_state.title: RED test: Add key name mismatch assertions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add structural/metadata assertions to test-onboarding-skill.sh verifying SKILL.md uses correct config key names matching validate-config.sh KNOWN_KEYS.

### New Test Functions

1. **test_key_name_jira_project**: Assert SKILL.md references jira.project (not jira.project_key) for the Jira config key.

2. **test_key_name_design_system_name**: Assert SKILL.md references design.system_name (not design.system) for the design system config key.

3. **test_design_tokens_path_audit**: Assert design.tokens_path is either present in validate-config.sh KNOWN_KEYS or absent from SKILL.md config table.

### TDD Requirement
Structural/metadata validation test. Must fail RED before key renames.

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0) after key renames
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] test_key_name_jira_project function exists
  Verify: grep -q "test_key_name_jira_project" tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] test_key_name_design_system_name function exists
  Verify: grep -q "test_key_name_design_system_name" tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh. Tests: 48 pass, 6 RED (expected).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
